title: agrostis schraderiana
intro: Agrostis schraderiana, also known as Schrader's bent grass or bent grass, is a species of grass in the genus Agrostis. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions and wounds. Agrostis schraderiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
